'''Peridon's Folly''' was a weapons depot that was operated by traders who sold obsolete arms to [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]]. Sectors were controlled by gunrunners and were separated by wastelands where the weapons were tested. [[IG-88B/Legends|IG-88B]] collected his first bounty there.

{{Planet-stub}}

*''[[The Bounty Hunters: Aurra Sing]]'' {{Mo}}
*{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
